description_long: This is a red, flexible stand-up pouch of Gibs Tomato Ketchup, prominently featuring the product name in bold white letters on the front. The front of the package displays a vibrant image of ketchup being poured onto a plate with fried snacks and a garnish of lettuce, along with tomatoes and a fork. The pouch has a small, gray spout at the top for dispensing the ketchup, which is typical for squeezable condiment packaging. The back of the pouch contains detailed product information, including ingredients, nutritional facts, and branding, all printed in black and white text. The sides of the pouch are narrow and show the continuation of the red packaging with some partial graphics and text. The overall appearance is glossy, with a smooth, slightly reflective surface, and the pouch is designed to be lightweight and easily portable.
description: A red, glossy stand-up pouch of Gibs Tomato Ketchup with bold branding, food imagery, and a dispensing spout at the top. The back features nutritional and product information.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Gibs Tomato Ketchup branding, food imagery, and the spout at the top.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the narrow profile of the pouch with partial graphics and text visible.
description_view_2: The back view displays detailed product information, including nutritional labeling and ingredients.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the slim edge of the pouch with some visible graphics and text.
attribute_brand_logo: A rectangular logo with the word 'Gibs' in black text on a white background, located at the top center of the front and back of the pouch.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the pouch displays the word 'Tomato' and images of tomatoes and ketchup, clearly indicating tomato flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel and ingredients list are visible on the back of the pouch, printed in black and white.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A green circular badge on the front reads 'Made with REAL Tomatoes', serving as a promotional highlight.
